message:
fix(tests): switch census assertions to prepared_insert_fast_lane_hits

The broader parser fast-path counter now includes internal helper
traffic and no longer maps 1:1 to user statements. Switch all three
census scenarios (C1 memory autocommit, C2 file-backed WAL, C3
explicit txn) to assert on the dedicated prepared INSERT fast lane
counter instead.

Also update contention_elimination stale placeholder panic messages
to reference the canonical evidence pack scripts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
